revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing blank templates I made to fill out template blank links
Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
Bot: remove deleted category Blank templates
Bot: remove deleted category Erroneous transclusions of Unichar/name
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Enable oldstyle figures to better fit small caps texts
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Enable oldstyle figures to better fit small caps texts
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Enable oldstyle figures to better fit small caps texts
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding support for the case where the input is not a Unicode code point. This happens if someone passes a value greater than 10FFFF. These used to be codepoints in very old UCS versions. See [[UTF-8#Older standards]] and [[Private Use Areas#History]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn | <#not a Unicode code point#> = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn | <#not a Unicode code point#> = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}| none || {{#switch:{{{gc|}}} | Zl | Zp | Zs={{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> |{{{na|}}}| {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] |[[{{#ifeq:{{{hval}}}|0020|space (punctuation)|{{lc:{{{na|}}}}}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] }}}} | Cc | Cs | Cp | Cn | <#not a Unicode code point#> = {{#ifeq:{{{nlink|}}} | <#salted#> || {{#if: {{{nlink|}}} | [[{{{nlink|}}}]] | {{error|Error using {{tl|unichar}}: Pagename expected in "nlink{{=}}"| tag=span }}}}}} | #default={{#switch:{{{nlink|<#salted#>}}} | <#salted#> ={{{na|}}} | =[[{{#switch:{{{hval}}}|0023|002E|003C|003E|005B|005D|007B|007C|007D|200E|200F|202A|202B|202C|202D|202E={{lc:{{{na|}}}}}|003A=colon (punctuation)|005F=underscore|#default=&#x{{{hval}}};}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]] | #default =[[{{{nlink|}}}{{!}}{{{na|}}}]]}}}}}}{{Documentation}}
